title: Visenia caracasana
taxonomy: Visenia caracasana is classified within the family Bignonaceae, which comprises flowering plants commonly known as clockvine or grapevine. This family is part of the order Lamiales, a large group of flowering plants that also includes mint, sage, and snapdragons. Visenia caracasana is native to Central and South America, where it thrives in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Visenia caracasana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants. The classification of Visenia caracasana also highlights its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment.
